title: elaeocarpus calomala var. pustulatus
intro: Elaeocarpus calomala var. pustulatus is a lesser-known variety of the Elaeocarpus calomala plant, belonging to the family Elaeocarpaceae and native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus calomala var. pustulatus include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made by boiling its roots in water to create a decoction that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
